transcript: Merry Christmas everyone! Thank you so much to all of my fans and for anybody who's new my name is Kira. Welcome! Hello! Hi! Do you like my new Christmas outfit? Thank you! Thank you! And because it's Christmas I decided to have a special christmas giveaway you're so sweet thank you so much very flattered thank you how did you get my number? What do you want? Okay, you've had your fun. You can stop now. Everybody, just stop. Stop commenting. I'm being serious. Stop. I'm not for sale! 911, what's your emergency? Hi, I think someone is trying to abduct me. Can you tell me where you are? I'm at home. Is there someone in your home? No, I was just doing a livestream and... Are you sure? What? Are you sure there's no one in your home? Leave me alone! Let me go!
